session.user:
In /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_plan_detail_screen.py, clipboard and repo_root are now accessed via `self._service` (the PlanService), not `self._provider`.
Fix pattern: 1. Where tests pass `clipboard=clipboard` to `FakePlanDataProvider(...)`, remove it from the provider and add it to `FakePlanService(clipboard=clipboard)`. 2. Where tests pass `repo_root=tmp_path` to `FakePlanDataProvider(...)`, remove it from the provider and add it to `FakePlanService(repo_root=tmp_path)`. 3. Update any `service=FakePlanService()` to include the moved parameters. 4. Also: FakePlanService has `set_plan_content`, `set_objective_content`, `set_review_threads`, `set_check_runs`, `set_ci_summaries` methods. If any test calls `provider.set_plan_content(...)` or similar domain setter methods, these should be changed to `service.set_plan_content(...)`.
Read the file first, find all clipboard=/repo_root= on FakePlanDataProvider constructors AND all domain setter calls (set_plan_content, set_objective_content, set_review_threads, set_check_runs, set_ci_summaries) on provider, and make the necessary edits. Do NOT change any other logic.
session.assistant: I'll read the test file first to identify all the places where these changes need to be made.

... [413 lines omitted] ...

Excellent! All changes have been applied successfully. Let me create a summary of the changes:
## Summary
I've successfully updated `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_plan_detail_screen.py` to move `clipboard` and `repo_root` parameters from `FakePlanDataProvider` to `FakePlanService`.
### Changes Made
**7 test methods were updated:**
1. **`test_copy_prepare_shortcut_1`** (lines 173-178) - Removed `clipboard=clipboard` from `FakePlanDataProvider` - Added `clipboard=clipboard` to `FakePlanService()`
2. **`test_copy_dispatch_shortcut_3`** (lines 199-203) - Removed `clipboard=clipboard` from `FakePlanDataProvider` - Added `clipboard=clipboard` to `FakePlanService()`
3. **`test_copy_checkout_shortcut_c_with_local_worktree`** (lines 222-234) - Removed `clipboard=clipboard` from `FakePlanDataProvider` - Added `clipboard=clipboard` to `FakePlanService()`
4. **`test_copy_pr_checkout_script_shortcut_e`** (lines 253-264) - Removed `clipboard=clipboard` from `FakePlanDataProvider` - Added `clipboard=clipboard` to `FakePlanService()`
5. **`test_rebase_keybinding_uses_toast_pattern`** (lines 292-296) - Removed `repo_root=tmp_path` from `FakePlanDataProvider` - Added `repo_root=tmp_path` to `FakePlanService()`
6. **`test_rewrite_remote_dismisses_and_dispatches`** (lines 367-371) - Removed `repo_root=tmp_path` from `FakePlanDataProvider` - Added `repo_root=tmp_path` to `FakePlanService()`
7. **`test_copy_rewrite_remote_copies_command`** (lines 408-412) - Removed `clipboard=clipboard` from `FakePlanDataProvider` - Added `clipboard=clipboard` to `FakePlanService()`
### Notes
- No domain setter methods (`set_plan_content`, `set_objective_content`, `set_review_threads`, `set_check_runs`, `set_ci_summaries`) were found being called on `provider` in this file, so no additional changes were needed for those. - All other test logic remained unchanged as requested.
